mapper.select:
SELECT A.AGNT_NM, S.AGNT_CD, S.MTRL_CD, M.MTRL_NM, L.LOC_CD, /* TBL_MTRL_M.PICKING_LOC_ID와 매핑된 코드 */ L.LOC_ID, M.FIXED_LOC_CD, CASE WHEN L.LOC_ID IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS ASSIGNED_YN FROM ( /* 재고가 있는 모든 상품 (누락 방지) */ SELECT DISTINCT CMPY_CD, WH_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD FROM TBL_STOCK WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STOCK_QTY > 0 AND CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND WH_CD = #{whCd} ) S INNER JOIN TBL_MTRL_M M WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CMPY_CD = M.CMPY_CD AND S.AGNT_CD = M.AGNT_CD AND S.MTRL_CD = M.MTRL_CD INNER JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M A WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CMPY_CD = A.CMPY_CD AND S.AGNT_CD = A.AGNT_CD /* 상품 마스터에 새로 만든 PICKING_LOC_ID로 피킹랙 조인 */ LEFT JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L WITH(NOLOCK) ON M.CMPY_CD = L.CMPY_CD AND M.PICKING_LOC_ID = L.LOC_ID AND L.WH_CD = #{whCd} AND L.PICKING_YN = 'Y' WHERE 1=1
AND (M.MTRL_CD LIKE '%' + #{mtrlNm} + '%' OR M.MTRL_NM LIKE '%' + #{mtrlNm} + '%')
ORDER BY ASSIGNED_YN ASC, S.MTRL_CD ASC

SELECT L.LOC_ID, L.LOC_CD, L.LOC_NM, S.STOCK_QTY, L.PICKING_YN FROM TBL_STOCK S WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CMPY_CD = L.CMPY_CD AND S.WH_CD = L.WH_CD AND S.LOC_ID = L.LOC_ID WHERE S.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND S.WH_CD = #{whCd} AND S.MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND S.AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} ORDER BY L.PICKING_YN DESC, S.STOCK_QTY DESC
SELECT LOC_ID, LOC_CD, LOC_NM, ZONE_ID FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND WH_CD = #{whCd} AND PICKING_YN = 'Y' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DELETED_YN = 'N' ORDER BY LOC_CD
mapper.update: /* 재고가 있는 평치 로케이션 중 가장 빠른 코드를 고정 적치지로 지정 */ WITH FLOOR_STOCK AS ( SELECT S.CMPY_CD, S.AGNT_CD, S.MTRL_CD, L.LOC_CD, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY S.CMPY_CD, S.AGNT_CD, S.MTRL_CD ORDER BY L.LOC_CD ASC ) AS RN FROM TBL_STOCK S WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CMPY_CD = L.CMPY_CD AND S.WH_CD = L.WH_CD AND S.LOC_ID = L.LOC_ID WHERE L.LOC_CD = 'FLOOR_' + S.AGNT_CD AND S.STOCK_QTY > 0 AND S.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND S.WH_CD = #{whCd} ) UPDATE M SET M.FIXED_LOC_CD = F.LOC_CD, M.UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), M.UPDT_USER = #{updtUser} FROM TBL_MTRL_M M INNER JOIN FLOOR_STOCK F ON M.CMPY_CD = F.CMPY_CD AND M.AGNT_CD = F.AGNT_CD AND M.MTRL_CD = F.MTRL_CD WHERE F.RN = 1;
